# POPWAM
POPWAM is a software company providing websites, landing pages, mobile applications, CRM systems, WordPress development, Firebase systems, email migration, server setup, automation workflows, Google Ads campaigns, SEO, performance optimization and AI-ready content structure.

Key pages:
- /services/ lists all services.
- /portfolio/ lists projects and case studies.
- /case-study/?id=project-slug provides project details.
- /contact/ provides contact options.
